allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); chars=d.get\('characters',{}\); areas=d.get\('areas',{}\); print\('CHARS:'\); [print\(f' {v[\\"name\\"]}: portrait={v.get\(\\"portraitPath\\",\\"\\"\)}, body={v.get\(\\"bodyPath\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for v in chars.values\(\)]; print\('AREAS:'\); [print\(f' {v[\\"name\\"]}: bg={v.get\(\\"backgroundPath\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for v in areas.values\(\)]")
